mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_enterprise (enterprise_code, name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, address, status, valid_date, ip_whitelist, login_mutual_exclusion, password_rule, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseCode}, #{item.name}, #{item.contactPerson}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.contactEmail}, #{item.address}, #{item.status}, #{item.validDate}, #{item.ipWhitelist}, #{item.loginMutualExclusion}, #{item.passwordRule}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO biz_enterprise (enterprise_code, name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, address, status, valid_date, ip_whitelist, login_mutual_exclusion, password_rule, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseCode}, #{item.name}, #{item.contactPerson}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.contactEmail}, #{item.address}, #{item.status}, #{item.validDate}, #{item.ipWhitelist}, #{item.loginMutualExclusion}, #{item.passwordRule}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), contact_person = VALUES(contact_person), contact_phone = VALUES(contact_phone), contact_email = VALUES(contact_email), address = VALUES(address), status = VALUES(status), valid_date = VALUES(valid_date), ip_whitelist = VALUES(ip_whitelist), login_mutual_exclusion = VALUES(login_mutual_exclusion), password_rule = VALUES(password_rule), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
